title: Conjurer Blues Harmonica C Mouth Organ for Children& Adults, Blues Harp 10 Holes Diatonic Harmonica Kids key of C, 1001C Blue
features: Conjurer Blues Harmonica C (Model:WH1001) 10 Hole 20 Tones Diatonic Harmonica Suitable for beginners, adults or children. The blues 10 hole harmonica can be played in a variety of styles, such as blues, folk, rock, country, jazz, etc

High quality and professional - The Conjurer harmonica uses special brass as the reed to easily blow out the sound while achieving excellent sound quality. Every Conjurer harmonica, whether professional or beginner, is tuned by a professional tuner. Colored aluminum cover plate and food grade ABS resin material ensure the quality and safety of each harmonica

Great Gift Choices - Conjurer Harp has the pretty look and pleasant sound, and each harmonica comes with a matching protective case. Conjurer harmonica is the perfect gift for kids, friends, or beginners, who want to learn how to play the harmonica

Maintenance and cleaning - In addition to the harmonica, the accessory includes a protective case, a cleaning cloth, and instructions. After each use of the harmonica, it is recommended to disinfect the surface with 75% alcohol and wipe it dry with a cleaning cloth to keep the harmonica clean

Conjurer Shops offers a return policy of up to 90 days. If you have any questions about our products, please contact customer service. For more information, you can click the seller's name at the top of the page: CONJURER-EU. Your questions will be answered within 24 hours
